case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. BENEDICTO LARA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200021212) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 CONTINUED TO SEP-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-28-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-27-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66939621)
